sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑποδείκνυμι

- Transliteration: Hupodeiknumi

- Phonetic: hoop-od-ike'-noo-mee

- Definition:

1. to show by placing under (i.e. before) the eyes

2. to show by words and arguments, i.e. to teach

3. to show by make known future things

- Origin: from G5259 and G1166

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5259 and G1166; to exhibit under the eyes (figuratively) to exemplify (instruct admonish): - show (fore-) warn.
